channel.title: NJ on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in NJ on Detention Pipeline

item.title: CELLCO PARTNERSHIP — ICE SOMERSET, NJ $1,665,072
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: CELLCO PARTNERSHIP Award ID: HSCETE14F00069 Amount: $1,665,071.60 Description: WIRELESS SERVICES FOR THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF 7/16/14 - 2/15/15. CONSOLIDATING CURRENT PURCHASE ORDERS - HSCETE-14-F-00025, HSCETE-14-F-00012 AND HSCETE-14-F-00011 INTO ONE ORDER. Period: 2014-07-18 to 2015-02-15 Location: SOMERSET, NJ (FIPS: 34035)

item.title: CORECIVIC, INC. — ICE ESSEX, NJ $12,799,094
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: CORECIVIC, INC. Award ID: HSCEDM12F00005 Amount: $12,799,093.62 Description: TO PROVIDE FUNDING FOR DETENTION&TRANSPORTATION SERVICES AT ELIZABETH DENTION CENTER UNDER CONTRACT NO. DJJODT05C0010/HSCEDM-12-F-00001- FOR THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FROM OCT 1, 2011 THRU SEPTEMBER 30, 2012. Period: 2011-09-30 to 2012-09-25 Location: ESSEX, NJ (FIPS: 34013)

item.title: PARAGON PROFESSIONAL SERVICES LLC — ICE ESSEX, NJ $4,694,325
item.description:
ICE contract.

item.title: TELCO SOLUTIONS, INC. — ICE BERGEN, NJ $1,969,354
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: TELCO SOLUTIONS, INC. Award ID: HSCETE12P00064 Amount: $1,969,354.33 Description: TELEPHONE COMPANY SUBPOENA GENERATOR (TCSG) SOFTWARE LICENSES Period: 2012-09-01 to 2017-04-30 Location: BERGEN, NJ (FIPS: 34003)

item.title: THE GEO GROUP, INC. — ICE ESSEX, NJ $5,670,000
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: THE GEO GROUP, INC. Award ID: 70CDCR26FR0000050 Amount: $5,670,000.00 Description: THE PURPOSE OF THIS NEW TASK ORDER IS TO PROVIDE FUNDING NECESSARY FOR DETENTION AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES FOR HOUSING ICE ALIENS AT THE DELANEY HALL CONTRACT DETENTION FACILITY IN NEWARK NEW JERSEY. Period: 2026-03-01 to 2026-03-31 Location: ESSEX, NJ (FIPS: 34013)

item.title: THOMAS J. MORRIS III — ICE GLOUCESTER, NJ $4,768,500
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: THOMAS J. MORRIS III Award ID: 70CMSW26P00000010 Amount: $4,768,500.00 Description: THIS AWARD PROVIDES M4 SEMI-AUTOMATIC 12 GAUGE SHOTGUNS TO SUPPORT LAW ENFORCEMENT OPERATIONS AND ICE- OFFICE OF FIREARMS AND TRAINING PROGRAMS AT FORT BENNING, GA. Period: 2026-02-10 to 2026-09-15 Location: GLOUCESTER, NJ (FIPS: 34015)

ICE contract.

item.title: VALOR NETWORK, INC. — ICE OCEAN, NJ $2,509,822

ICE contract.
